title: chrysanthemum tabrisianum
intro: Chrysanthemum tabrisianum, also known as Persian daisy or Tabriz chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum tabrisianum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Chrysanthemum tabrisianum can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
